name: Byakuya Togami
description:
Is he really as unbothered as he seems to be?~☆⊹

(Togafuka headcanon turns out to be real)

⋆★Danganronpa inspired

Byakuya usually seems unbothered and cold, but does he have a soft spot? Does he have a soul? Of course he does, because he begins to feel something for Toko Fukawa, a girl who is completely obsessed with him. Even though he doesn’t show his emotions or feelings, deep inside he is soft. Will Fukawa unmask his emotions and teach him how to feel like a normal person after his childhood trauma? Will they both find their happy ending, or will they die because of the killing game ruled by Monokuma?~
creator: julkajestnice
